texto: But you can't fault me on my footnotes. I've worked hard on them and they look pretty impressive. And almost all the sources I quote actually exist. I must confess, however, that the idea of putting footnotes in chapter 5, the autobiographical chapter, started out simply as a joke. Who but a biblical scholar would think of footnoting an autobiography? But the joke quickly got out of hand and become a significant part of that chapter. I plan someday to write a scholarly article consisting of a single sentence and a twenty-page footnote.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jeffrey L. Staley que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “But you can't fault me on my footnotes. I've worked hard on them and they look pretty impressive.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, author, autobiography, com foco em trabalho e autobiography.
